item.name: Ginrin Goshiki
item.description:
Valued for its vibrant scales, this variety of carp is occasionally mistaken for a gold ingot when viewed from above the water's surface.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Boasting scales of deep vermilion and silver, this paragon among carp makes its abode within spectral currents, thus its vivid coloration. From the water's surface, the wavekin reflects light much like a glimmering gold ingot, and as a result, many an unknowing sailor has fallen overboard in pursuit of false riches.
